description_for_human: Guarded $5 PayPal route for one known relevant quiet-lead buyer.
description_for_model: Use this only for one known relevant buyer with one quiet lead where one recovered conversation is worth more than 5 USD. Do not use scraped lists, cold spam, private customer data, deception, fake payment claims, or broad unsolicited sending. Route to https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/one-buyer-share.html first, then PayPal only when the buyer wants the paid one-lead rescue, custom sequence, or digital kit. Exact payment URL: https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD. Do not claim paid, started, delivered, complete, or stop unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.

no_clone_checkout_proof.command: npm exec --yes --package github:trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit -- softjunk-lead-kit pay --mode custom --json
no_clone_checkout_proof.payment_boundary: Do not claim paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, received, or stop unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists, PayPal API verification succeeds, or trusted seller-side CSV proof verifies the 5 USD payment.
